root.name: Make the objective text italic on Slide 11
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly found and applied italic formatting to the objective text on slide 11, and did not introduce errors or unintended changes.

children.name: Objective Text is Italicized
children.description: Checks that the identified objective text on slide 11 is fully italicized after the modification.

children.name: No Unintended Changes
children.description: Ensures that no other text on slide 11 (other than the objective text) was made italic, and that no unrelated content was changed.

children.name: No Extraneous Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Verify that only slide 11 has been modified, and no other slides have been added or removed.

metadata.task: Slide 11: Make the objective text italic
